title: eriastrum filifolium
intro: Eriastrum filifolium, also known as the woolly-star or star woolly-star, is a perennial flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Eriastrum filifolium include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture for use in herbal remedies, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat a variety of ailments.
